7:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v2.3 ships importers for 6 major memory providers. Each importer handles extraction, field mapping, and data import end to end. You don't need to write export scripts or manually map fields."}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Supported Providers"}]
9:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Provider"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Import Via"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"CLI Flag"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mem0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SDK or REST API"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Letta"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["SDK, ",["$","code",null,{"children":".af"}]," file, or REST"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--from letta --agent-file-path ./agent.af"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Zep"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SDK (per-session extraction)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--from zep --api-key sk-xxx"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cognee"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SDK (Kuzu graph export)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--from cognee"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Honcho"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"SDK (Workspace/Peer/Session/Message model)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--from honcho"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"SuperMemory"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"REST API"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"--from supermemory --api-key sk-xxx"}]}]]}]]}]]}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"For providers that do not expose a clean API, there is an agentic fallback. Mnemosyne generates the exact migration script or AI agent prompt you need."}]
b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Start"}]
c:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Import from Mem0\nhermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx\n\n# Dry run first (validate but don't write)\nhermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx --dry-run\n\n# Import from a JSON export file\nhermes mnemosyne import --file ./export.json\n\n# List all supported providers\nhermes mnemosyne import --list-providers\n"}]}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How It Works"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Every importer follows the same pipeline:"}]
f:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extract"}]," — Pull all memories from the source provider (SDK, REST API, or file)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Validate"}]," — Check that extracted data has the required fields"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transform"}]," — Map provider-specific fields to Mnemosyne's format"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Import"}]," — Write into working memory with identity metadata preserved"]}],"\n"]}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"All metadata, timestamps, user/agent identity, and original IDs are preserved in the import."}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Identity Preservation"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"Imported memories keep their original author identity:"}]
13:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mem0"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user_id"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"agent_id"}]," become ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Letta"}],": agent identity from ",["$","code",null,{"children":".af"}]," metadata"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Zep"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user_id"}]," from session owner"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cognee"}],": node labels and relationships map to triples"]}],"\n"]}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":"You can override the session or assign everything to a channel:"}]
15:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"hermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx \\\n  --channel-id my-team-channel\n"}]}]
16:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Agentic Fallback"}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":"For providers without a clean API, or when you cannot install the source SDK:"}]
18:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Generate a migration script\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --generate-script\n\n# Generate AI agent instructions (give these to your AI)\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --agentic\n\n# Generate documentation for writing your own importer\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --generate-docs\n"}]}]
19:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Per-Provider Guides"}]
1a:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/migration/from-mem0","children":"From Mem0"}]," — Cloud + self-hosted, SDK pagination"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/migration/from-letta","children":"From Letta"}]," — AgentFile, SDK, offline"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/migration/from-zep","children":"From Zep"}]," — Session-by-session, temporal graph"]}],"\n"]}]
